---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new config type for Config-Generator
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Config Type
Which configuration file type would you like to see supported?

## Use Case
Describe your use case. Why do you need this config type?

## Example
Provide an example of what the generated config should look like:

```conf
# Example config
key = value
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context or links to documentation about this config type.
